canvas-gunmetal.$description: Canvas Gunmetal — Hero and feature-section background — the warm gray-green tint distinguishes Custo from generic white SaaS canvases and reads as architectural concrete rather than digital surface

obsidian.$description: Obsidian — Primary text, hairline borders, icon strokes — the highest-contrast ink in the system, used for headings and structural dividers

paper-white.$description: Paper White — Body section backgrounds, reversed text on gunmetal canvas, text on the dark product photography

anodized-graphite.$description: Anodized Graphite — Dark surface for product photography, secondary headings, and elevated text — echoes the mailbox finish so the UI and product share a material

brushed-steel.$description: Brushed Steel — Muted body text, list dividers, secondary icon strokes — sits between Paper White and Obsidian for inline metadata and subdued links

linen-mist.$description: Linen Mist — Light border and divider color for headings and section rules — a hairline tone that never competes with Obsidian structural lines

aluminum-hairline.$description: Aluminum Hairline — Input field borders, footer separators, the lightest structural line — appears only where a near-invisible boundary is needed

pp-neue-montreal.$description: Single-family type system used for everything from body copy to 57px display statements — the geometric uniformity across weights is the signature choice, avoiding any secondary or display-specific font so the wordmark 'CUSTO®' set at 57px reads as the same typographic family as a 15px form input label

gunmetal-hero-canvas.$description: Surface level 1: Full-bleed hero and key feature band backgrounds

paper-white.$description: Surface level 2: Default content section background — body copy, text-image rows, footer

anodized-graphite.$description: Surface level 3: Dark elevated surface, product photography backdrop, reversed heading text
